detail: Created 11 skills: implementation-planner, test-first-executor, changelog-enforcer, council-review, risky-module-review, release-readiness, docs-sync, cooldown-resume, dependency-audit, repo-memory-updater, modularity-review

All 20 key files verified. Syntax checks pass. Manifest OK. Audit clean. Simulation PASS. Resume test PASS with isolated state.

Audited Multica gaps, implemented lifecycle-driven task execution with agent/runtime binding, unified scheduler/playbook task creation, updated the Tasks UI for history/comments, and added targeted workflow regression coverage. Full suite still has a pre-existing router failure in tests/test_model_router.py.

Fixed GitHub Pages/frontend auth routing issues, restored deterministic MODEL_MAP alias routing, stabilized router/v3 auth tests, updated changelog, and verified the repo with ./.venv/bin/pytest -x (613 passed) plus a successful frontend production build.

Reproduced hosted schedule/logs/agent-profile regressions, fixed backend.server schedule + observability coverage, aligned agent profile persistence with the Control Plane UI, restored frontend react-scripts build/test tooling, and verified with python3 -m pytest -x (729 passed, 15 skipped), frontend tests (46 passed), and npm run build.

Reproduced the GitHub Pages /login crash and legacy workspace route hijack, added frontend regression tests, fixed the missing login icon imports, redirected the legacy workspace alias back into the auth flow, verified with pytest -x (737 passed, 15 skipped), full frontend tests (48 passed), and a manual GitHub Pages-style browser check on /local-llm-server/login and /local-llm-server/workspace-mobile.

Rebuilt the hosted dashboard into a mobile-first workspace overview, restored legacy route and auth redirects, prioritized NVIDIA Nemotron defaults, added frontend CI coverage, and verified with pytest -x plus frontend test/build passes.

Added structured Agent Mode handoff metadata for repo / GitHub / container-backed direct-chat requests, wired one-click retry/settings actions into ChatPage, and verified with pytest -x, full frontend tests, and a production build.

Persisted Agent Mode handoff metadata in chat sessions, restored retry/settings CTAs after reload, refined direct-chat handoff heuristics to avoid explanatory GitHub/Docker false positives, and verified with pytest -x, full frontend tests, and a production build.

Added limited-mode UUID chat session support, pre-send Agent Mode readiness guidance, inline GitHub readiness, persisted handoff CTAs, and verified with full pytest, frontend tests, and a production build. Attempted a local browser smoke; login/setup rendered, but a full direct-chat smoke remains for a non-setup-gated flow.

Extended direct-chat handoffs with direct workflow routing into Tasks and recurring Schedules, kept limited-mode UUID chat sessions reloadable, and verified with pytest -x, full frontend tests, and a production build.

Added a supported task-harness runtime adapter, surfaced it in setup, improved chat workflow routing into Tasks/Schedules, hid lifecycle controls for on-demand CLI runtimes, and verified with pytest -x, frontend tests, and production build.

Added live agent progress/status streaming, mobile-first chat telemetry, editable saved setup flows, environment-backed Langfuse defaults, automatic skill guidance for complex work, and generic task-harness naming. Verified with pytest -x, full frontend tests, and a production build.
Grouped screenshots by area, added README gallery sync automation, removed stale generated root artifacts and backup files, and refreshed docs/script references.

Bounded direct-chat provider timeouts, added in-thread recovery/diagnostic responses for provider failures, plumbed custom provider timeouts through ProviderRouter, updated changelog/state, and verified with pytest -x (757 passed, 15 skipped).
